title: Mr. Romeo
subTitle: A man enjoys the luxuries of life as a celebrity in Bangalore. However, his life is upended when he stumbles upon a series of medical crimes and decides to expose the perpetrator.

title: Mookkanan Kayiru
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Vaalibha Vilayattu
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Idhu Enna Maayam
subTitle: Arun creates a match making app that involves his theatre skills.But when a rich man requests to set him up with Arun's ex-girlfriend, Arun has second thoughts about helping him.

title: Aanai
subTitle: A former policeman is hired as a bodyguard for a girl child after a series of kidnappings in the city. However, he is in for a rude shock when the girl gets kidnapped and killed.

title: Nallavanukku Nallavan
subTitle: Gangadharan, a kind man, hires Manickam, a reformed criminal, at his factory, who in time wins his trust and is put in charge of the business. However, Gangadharan's spoiled son is unhappy about it.

title: Thoranai
subTitle: A man manages to find his estranged brother, who had run away from home twenty years ago. However, his brother's miserable past life impedes him from starting afresh.

title: Veeram
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Winner
subTitle: Fed up with Sakthi's hooliganism, his parents send him to stay with his grandparents in their village. However, he gets into more trouble when the family of the girl he loves does not accept him.

title: Winner
subTitle: Fed up with Sakthi's hooliganism, his parents send him to stay with his grandparents in their village. However, he gets into more trouble when the family of the girl he loves does not accept him.

title: Ore Raththam
subTitle: Mahesh's sister Kamakshi finds herself in a delicate situation, having conceived a child with her lover, and attempts to conceal this fact from her family.

title: Vanakkam Vathiyare
subTitle: Rajappa earns his livelihood by beating up people for a fee. But when his dying mother asks Rajappa to mend his ways, he decides to lead a peaceful life.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Shree
subTitle: Shree's father abandons him when he suspects him of killing his daughter. Agitated, Shree leaves his house and becomes a goon.

title: Deepavali
subTitle: A rich woman gets exploited by her relatives after she loses her son. Her troubles vanish after Ravi treats her like his mother and protects her from the wicked people.

title: Thimiru
subTitle: A medical student saves the life of a professor and his daughter. When the girl falls in love with him, she discovers that his tragic past has been haunting him.

title: Meesaya Murukku
subTitle: Adhi, an aspiring musician, falls in love with Nila, a young woman in his college. Soon, he finds himself surrounded by several challenges as he tries to pursue his dreams.

title: Naadodigal
subTitle: Karunakaran, Chandran and Paandi fight tooth and nail to unite their friend, Saravanan, with Prabha but an unfortunate incident changes the trio's lives for the worse.

title: Darling
subTitle: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Darling
subTitle: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Viswanathan Velai Venum
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Ayodhya
subTitle: Rajesh is shocked to find that he has an illegitimate sister and sets out on a journey to find her. However, several dangerous thugs obstruct his way.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Majunu
subTitle: Vasanth, the son of a wealthy politician, falls in love with Heena. However, soon she becomes a suspect in a bomb blast, leading Vasanth to protect her, unaware of the dark secret that awaits him.

title: Soorakkottai Singakkuutti
subTitle: A happily married man meets a dancer and welcomes her into his family. However, things take a turn when she reveals her true intentions.

title: Adi Thadi
subTitle: Tirupati, an ageing don, falls in love with Priya, a young college student. However, trouble brews when he learns that Priya loves another man.

title: Kumaran Rajini Rasigan
subTitle: Bujji moves to Chennai after an argument with his childhood friend Chitti. He returns after 12 years to prove his love for her.

title: Paattali
subTitle: Despite being the sole heir to a large fortune, Shanmugam is forced to work as a servant by his aunt. Circumstances force him to marry Kannamma even though he is in love with Shakuntala.

title: Nilave Mugam Kaattu
subTitle: Prakash and Murthy forge an unlikely friendship after a tragic accident involving their parents. Their bond is tested when they unknowingly fall for the same girl, challenging their loyalty.
